questions.question: Which of the following is a characteristic of the Chalk and Talk method?
options: It uses PowerPoint Presentation
It is more interactive than other methods
It is used for large classes
It is less engaging for students
questions.explanation: The Chalk and Talk method is more interactive than other methods as it involves the teacher lecturing and students taking notes or participating in discussions.

questions.question: What is a major advantage of using PowerPoint Presentations in teaching?
options: It is more time-consuming to create
It allows for more interaction with students
It can be easily distributed to students
It helps to keep students engaged
questions.explanation: PowerPoint Presentations can be easily distributed to students, making it a convenient method for teaching large classes or remote students.

questions.question: Which of the following is a disadvantage of the Chalk and Talk method?
options: It allows for more interaction with students
It is more time-consuming to create
It can be easily distributed to students
It is less engaging for students
questions.explanation: The Chalk and Talk method can be time-consuming to create, as teachers need to prepare and deliver the lecture content in a structured format.

questions.question: What is a key feature of the Chalk and Talk method?
options: It involves the use of PowerPoint Presentations
It is a lecture-based method
It is more interactive than other methods
It is used for small classes only
questions.explanation: The Chalk and Talk method is a lecture-based method where the teacher delivers the lecture content in a structured format, often using a chalkboard or whiteboard.

questions.question: Which of the following is a benefit of using PowerPoint Presentations in the Chalk and Talk method?
options: It allows for more interaction with students
It is more time-consuming to create
It can be easily distributed to students
It helps to illustrate complex concepts
questions.explanation: PowerPoint Presentations can be used to illustrate complex concepts in a clear and concise manner, making it easier for students to understand the material.
